old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.7.1.7","title":"Make Announce relay retry-safe","description":"Do not irreversibly commit Announce acceptance before required relay transmission succeeds. On failure, clean transient bootstrap state so the same origin sequence can be retried, or use a bounded explicit pending relay.","acceptance_criteria":"Transmit failure followed by fresh L2 retry succeeds; no replay/pin leak blocks retry; peer/bootstrap/pending state remains bounded.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-07-20T06:07:13.096141078Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-20T06:07:13.096141078Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.7.1.7","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.7.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-20T06:07:13.179011639Z","created_by":"ec2-user","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Staged bounded AnnounceProcessor updates and commit only after required relay TX succeeds; transient bootstrap peer is forgotten on failure. Added same-sequence fresh-frame retry and peer/bootstrap bound test; existing bound regression passes.
